{"query":"Perplexity Deep Research in Computer private company research website publishing structured outputs presentation feature release","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1838,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/introducing-perplexity-deep-research","title":"Introducing Perplexity Deep Research","content":"When you ask a Deep Research question, Perplexity performs dozens of searches, reads hundreds of sources, and reasons through the material to autonomously deliver a comprehensive report.
We believe everyone should have access to powerful research tools.
Research with reasoning - Equipped with search and coding capabilities, Perplexity’s Deep Research mode iteratively searches, reads documents, and reasons about what to do next, refining its research plan as it learns more about the subject areas.
Deep Research on Perplexity attains a 21.1% accuracy score on Humanity’s Last Exam, significantly higher than Gemini Thinking, o3-mini, o1, DeepSeek-R1, and many other leading models.
Humanity’s Last Exam⁠ is a comprehensive benchmark for AI systems consisting of over 3,000 questions across 100+ subjects ranging from mathematics and science to history and literature."},{"url":"https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/deep-research-now-in-computer","title":"Deep Research, now in Computer","content":"Computer turns those answers into work-ready formats like PDFs, decks, dashboards, websites, and more.
Now users can ask a complex query and Computer will break it down into subtasks routed across 20+ frontier models.
Take a question like “Are the non-competes of the employees from the Texas startup we just acquired still enforceable now that we're a California company?”
Compile their financial performance, store formats, private‑label penetration, supply‑chain resilience, labor cost exposure, and recent restructuring actions into a structured table, plus a short memo highlighting major risks and upside scenarios."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/perplexity-ai_introducing-deep-research-on-perplexity-activity-7296217839827308546---0z","title":"Introducing Deep Research on Perplexity. Deep Research lets you generate in-depth research reports on any topic. Available to everyone for free—up to 5 queries per day for non-subscribers and 500… | P","content":"With the Hypothesis Generator Agent, you can turn a broad idea into a structured, testable hypothesis in minutes.
Originally introduced in February 2025, these systems quickly attracted significant attention for their ability to perform structured, multi-step reasoning across large information spaces.
In the coming years, Deep Research will likely become a fundamental component of vertical search, business intelligence, and enterprise applications—addressing the growing need to move beyond simple information retrieval toward comprehension, synthesis, and reasoning.
Perplexity isn’t a search engine."},{"url":"https://linas.substack.com/p/perplexity-computer-guide","title":"The Definitive Guide to Perplexity Computer (April 2026)","content":"How Perplexity's 19-model AI Agent works, what it costs, and whether it's worth $200/month in 2026.
Perplexity Computer is a cloud-based AI agent that orchestrates 19 frontier models - including Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini, and Grok - to execute multi-step projects from a single prompt.
It costs $200/month, includes 10,000 credits, and can research, code, deploy, and automate across 400+ connected tools without any local setup.
On February 25, 2026, Perplexity launched Computer to Max subscribers.
By March, Perplexity’s annual recurring revenue surpassed $450 million, roughly doubling from the approximately $200 million it reported in February - a spike driven directly by Computer adoption and a shift to usage-based pricing."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/intallura_breaking-perplexity-launches-deep-research-activity-7296523544224559105-G2f0","title":"Sign Up | LinkedIn","content":"LinkedIn and 3rd parties use essential and non-essential cookies to provide, secure, analyze and improve our Services, and to show you relevant ads (including professional and job ads) on and off LinkedIn.
Learn more in our Cookie Policy."}]}

{"query":"Perplexity Deep Research in Computer private company research website publishing structured outputs presentation feature release","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.marktechpost.com/2026/06/11/perplexity-moves-deep-research-into-computer-routing-research-subtasks-across-20-frontier-models-for-reports-decks-and-dashboards","title":"Perplexity Moves Deep Research Into Computer, Routing Research Subtasks Across 20+ Frontier Models For Reports, Decks, And Dashboards - MarkTechPost","content":"Home Editors Pick Agentic AI Perplexity Moves Deep Research Into Computer, Routing Research Subtasks Across 20+ Frontier... # Perplexity Moves Deep Research Into Computer, Routing Research Subtasks Across 20+ Frontier Models For Reports, Decks, And Dashboards. Perplexity has moved Deep Research into Computer, its multi-model orchestration system. Deep Research now breaks hard questions into subtasks and routes them across 20+ frontier models. ## **Deep Research in Computer**. Deep Research is a mode that runs many searches, reads sources, and writes a cited report. Computer is a cloud system that coordinates up to 20 AI models in one workflow. Deep Research in Computer is built on two parts: the Agent Search SDK and Search as Code. The script runs in a sandbox and calls Perplexity’s Agentic Search SDK. Search as Code is rolling out through both Computer and the Agent API. | Benchmark | Source | Legacy Deep Research | Deep Research in Computer |.","score":0.63098115,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2qRSDUuZ2xY","title":"Deep Research in Perplexity Computer","content":"Deep Research in Perplexity Computer

Deep Research is now a native skill inside Perplexity Computer. It connects to the agent harness that powers Computer, with access to search as code generation, long running sandboxes, connectors, tools, and licensed data.

Available now to Pro and Max subscribers.
Learn more about Deep Research in Computer: https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/deep-research

","score":0.62879556,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/products/deep-research","title":"Deep Research, Now in Computer | Perplexity","content":"# Deep Research built for the hardest questions. Deep Research turns complex questions into structured, fully cited research, then delivers work-ready reports, decks, and dashboards inside Computer. ## Built on Perplexity's search technology. Deep Research in Computer is built on our Agent Search SDK and Search as Code architecture. With one complex question, Deep Research builds a research plan, finds primary sources across hundreds of sites, and cites every claim. ### Reads both your files and the best sources on the web. Then build on the report, turning it into a deck or dashboard, all inside Computer. Find the best city for our next coffee shop: daily visitors, rents, competitors, and a clear recommendation. Find it with Deep Research, then get it in the format you need: a brief, a deck, a spreadsheet, fully formatted and ready to use. *   Where to open next Page 2 / City comparison Austin now draws 388 412 daily visitors, the strongest pull of the shortlist.","score":0.5780915,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/deep-research-now-in-computer","title":"{{IW4QaZoc2}}","content":"Deep Research is agentic, iterative search that behaves more like a traditional research analyst. It runs multiple searches instead of one, reading the results each time before reasoning what to search for next. It evaluates whether it has enough evidence and notes conflicts, reads deeply, and then synthesizes the results into a single authoritative answer. The depth is why Deep Research takes longer and can use more compute than standard search. It’s also why Deep Research has been added to Computer. Today we’re also announcing that Deep Research can write its own search programs through a new approach called Search as Code. Instead of running one query at a time, Computer builds a custom search plan for each question and runs thousands of steps in parallel. Deep Research is the foundation of knowledge work. The quality of a memo, brief, plan, or analysis depends on the quality of the sources and reasoning behind it. In Computer, Deep Research is the entry point to a universal search skill.","score":0.5404151,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/news/perplexity-launches-own-freemium-deep-183914022.html","title":"Perplexity launches its own freemium ‘deep research’ product","content":"In a blog post announcing Deep Research, Perplexity wrote that the feature "excels at a range of expert-level tasks—from finance and marketing to product research.". To create this report, Perplexity said Deep Research "iteratively searches, reads documents, and reasons about what to do next, refining its research plan as it learns more about the subject areas," supposedly "similar to how a human might research a new topic.". Perplexity said its Deep Research tool scored 21.1% on the test, easily beating most other models, such as Gemini Thinking (6.2%), Grok-2 (3.8%), and OpenAI's GPT-4o (3.3%) — but not quite matching OpenAI's Deep Research (26.6%). While it's too early to know how these tools will affect everyday and professional research as they become more popular, The Economist recently highlighted shortcomings to OpenAI's Deep Research that likely apply here too: not just limitations to its "creativity" in interpreting data and a tendency to rely on sources that are "easily available," but a larger risk that "outsourcing all your research to a supergenius assistant" could "reduce the number of opportunities to have your best ideas.".","score":0.48528314,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.46,"request_id":"c368575d-eeb8-41c9-9a35-58fc89ba77ec"}
